description.en: Essential invoicing and accounting for a single user.
description.zh: 单用户的基本发票和会计功能。

description.en: Premium features for growing teams, including unlimited user seats and roles, automated bank imports, and unlimited receipt OCR.
description.zh: 适用于成长团队的高级功能，包括无限用户席位和角色、自动银行导入和无限收据OCR。

weaknesses.en: Complex setup process for new users
weaknesses.zh: 新用户复杂的设置过程

targetAudience.en: Small business owners, contractors, and agencies.
targetAudience.zh: 小型企业主、自由职业者和代理机构。

positioning.en: Wave is positioned as a comprehensive financial management tool for small businesses, offering essential accounting and invoicing features at a low cost.
positioning.zh: Wave 定位为面向小型企业的全面财务管理工具，提供基本的会计和发票功能，价格低廉。
